title: The Wind Rises
actors: Hideaki Anno, Miori Takimoto, Hidetoshi Nishijima
plot: Jiro Horikoshi studies assiduously to fulfill his aim of becoming an aeronautical engineer. As WWII begins, fighter aircraft designed by him end up getting used by the Japanese Empire against its foes.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 26 wins & 54 nominations total
